plan.caption:
White Flare ETBs cost $145. Opening one averages $67. That gap is $78 in favor of sealed.

Booster EV: $7.46 per pack across 9 packs.
Sealed price: $145.
Open EV: $67.
Verdict: Keep it sealed.

Top chase cards driving that sealed premium: Victini at $518, Reshiram ex at $488, Oshawott at $93. The pulls are real but the odds are long. The sealed price already prices in the excitement.

pokeev.com runs this math on every set so you never have to guess.

Save this before you crack a White Flare ETB.

Rip or keep on your copy?

Follow @pokeev.tcg for the live Expected Value on every sealed set.
Link in bio -> pokeev.com

brief.reason: Opening averages $67. Sealed ETB holds at $145.|The $78 gap makes holding the smarter play.
